title: The Big Cheese Rat and Mouse Poison (15 x 20 g) - Rodent Killer, Rat Poisoning Blocks, Bait Station Refills, Red & Rat and Mouse Bait Box - Safe Control of Rat Poison and Mouse Poison, Black
features: Product 1: The most powerful rat and mouse poison available on the amateur market
Product 1: Use with The Big Cheese Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station (A tamper-resistant bait station must be used by law when baiting for rats and mice)
Product 2: Compact bait station: measuring 22.6 x 12 x 7.6cm, the rodent bait station has a black, low-profile design to fit alongside walls and rodent pathways

Product 2: Use with all rodent bait: the bait station is compatible with all different types of rodent bait including block bait, grain bait, pasta bait and natural grain bait. Bait is not included and must be bought separately
Product 2: Key and lock feature: lockable bait station protects children and pets from accidental contact with rodent bait
Product 2: Easy to set up: the bait station simply needs bait placed inside before locking and setting in place where rodents have been active
description: From the manufacturer GUARANTEED EFFECTIVE RODENT CONTROL FOR BIG PEST PROBLEMS Bait & Kill: Our Ultra Power range offers the only true single-feed rodent poison available on the amateur market. The highly palatable formula contains a powerful active ingredient that delivers a lethal dose to rodents in just one feed. Catch & Kill: We offer a selection of versatile rodent trap solutions that are highly effective, with satisfaction guaranteed. Our powerful snap traps have been designed with durability in mind to be used again and again, whilst our innovative electronic products use smart-circuit technology to deliver a quick and humane kill. Pet-safe and child-safe options are available. Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Self-setting multi-catch mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping and are ideal for large rodent infestations. Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced mega-sonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Pack contains 15 ready-to-use blocks, suitable for use in all bait stations POWERFUL RODENT CONTROL Our ULTRA POWER Block Bait contains the most powerful poison available on the amateur market and KILLS RATS & MICE IN ONE FEED. With single-feed bait technology just like the professionals use, our Ultra Power range delivers high-performance rodent control with satisfaction guaranteed. Single-feed bait technology Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in rodent control for over 25 years Ultra Power Block Bait Rodent Killer - 15 x 20g from The Big Cheese Ready-for-use bait for the control of rats and mice in and around buildings. Ultra Power Block Bait Rodent Killer from The Big Cheese is a fast-acting rodent poison for indoor and outdoor use in tamper-resistant bait stations. This powerful formula combines proven palatability with the most potent active ingredient available on the amateur market to deliver fast and effective control of rodent pests. Part of the Ultra Power range, this product will kill rats and mice in just one feed, with satisfaction guaranteed. KILLS IN ONE FEED The most powerful rat and mouse poison available on the amateur market Indoor and outdoor use Use with The Big Cheese Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station (A tamper-resistant bait station must be used by law when baiting for rats and mice) Part of the ULTRA POWER range. Contains brodifacoum. Single-feed bait technology Our ULTRA POWER Block Bait is the only true single-feed bait available for amateur use. This powerful formula contains brodifacoum, the most potent poison available on the amateur market which KILLS RATS & MICE IN ONE FEED. With single-feed bait technology just like the professionals use, our Ultra Power range delivers high-performance rodent control with satisfaction guaranteed. Baiting Tips Rodents may consume bait for up to 4 days after consuming a lethal dose. Continue to replenish the station as directed using The Big Cheese Ultra Power Block Bait. It is a legal requirement to use a bait station when baiting mice and rats - image shows The Big Cheese Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station which is available for purchase separately. Just like the professionals use The Big Cheese ULTRA POWER brings you an elite range of products specially engineered to tackle rodent infestations quickly and effectively. We are so confident that you'll be impressed with our product range that we have made an on-pack pledge: Satisfaction Guaranteed! Rodent control just like the professionals use, ULTRA POWER is the solution for BIG PEST PROBLEMS. Bait & Kill: Our Home Choice range offers a bait for every situation, and with 50% LESS POISON than previous formulations, it is the ideal choice for use in and around the home. The range includes damp proof wax blocks suitable for use in all weather conditions, chew thru grain bait sachets for easy bait placement, and highly palatable fresh pasta bait recommended for food preparation areas. Follow our easy on-pack icons to choose the most effective bait for your situation.Catch & Kill: We offer a wide selection of conventional spring traps with a powerful snap and hold. Our Fresh 'n Tasty range is ready-baited with The Big Cheese Fresh 'n Tasty Mouse & Rat Attractant - a poison-free formula proven to dramatically increase catch rate. Pet-safe and easy-set options are also available making The Big Cheese Catch & Kill range suitable for use in most areas of the household.Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality cage traps and ready-baited mouse traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Easy-set mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping.Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced ultrasonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Plus a new selection of low-cost consumables designed to help defend homes from rodent infestations. Poison-free and safe for use around children. HOME CHOICE: Choose your bait What is Home Choice? Here at The Big Cheese, we understand that tackling a rodent infestation can be daunting. We are here to take the stress out of rodent control.The Big Cheese Home Choice range provides proven and effective control of rats and mice using 50% less poison than previous formulations, making it the ideal choice for use in and around the home.With a bait for every situation, and a lower toxicity formula to give peace of mind to families and pet owners, you can't go wrong with Home Choice.Just follow our colour-coded icons to find the suitable bait for your situation. Damp proof Our professional-grade wax blocks are moisture-resistant, staying fresh and highly palatable even in damp and wet weather conditions.Made with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives, everything down to the shape of the block has been specially designed to achieve maximum effectiveness.Their universal design means they are compatible with all bait stations.Suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Chew thru Our grain bait is supplied in highly attractive chew thru sachets - there is no need to touch the bait.The pre-measured sachets are ready to place directly into a bait station, and are available in a range of different pack sizes for both mice and rats.Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, this fast-acting bait is a great alternative to our wax blocks if you are nervous about handling the bait. Food prep Our fresh pasta bait is highly palatable, making it ideal for use in kitchens and food preparation areas where there are competing food sources that may otherwise result in reduced bait consumption.The bait stays clumped together even when nibbled, creating less mess and preventing cross-contamination.Our pasta bait is supplied in ready-to-use sachets - just place directly into your bait station.
